name: cloud-only.runtime-smoke

runtimeProof.compose: Postgres, MinIO, and MailHog were running; Postgres accepted SELECT now()
runtimeProof.conversations: GET /api/v1/conversations returned non-empty rows with threadId and avatar
runtimeProof.messages: GET /api/v1/conversations/:id/messages returned incoming direct row with fromAvatar=true and incoming group row with fromAvatar=true from sender metadata
runtimeProof.sendRealtime: POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/send/text returned msgId=7898420034356 and SSE /api/v1/realtime emitted message for the same account
runtimeProof.files: POST /api/v1/files/init, POST /api/v1/files/:id/blob, GET /api/v1/files/:id/blob round-tripped upload.txt with cmp success
runtimeProof.desktop: bun run tauri dev relaunched Vite localhost:1420 and target/debug/zca-desktop

secretHandling: No device token, Zalo credential, cookie, message body, or file content is stored in this artifact.
